title: 並んで待つのも悪かねえ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Inari One and I are headed back
to the academy when...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. People are lining out the door for this
ramen shop today too?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
It's gotten pretty popular. Guess we'll just have to
join the queue. My stomach won't settle for
anything less.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oguri mentioned that ramen shop over there
bein' real good a while back, and I've been kinda
wantin' to check it out.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But ya know, I'm not really a fan of standin'
'round, waitin' patiently in line!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, I'd hate to ignore her
recommendation, so I'm ponderin' what I should
do.
choice_data_list: Want to line up together then?
Want to line up together then?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
choice_data_list: The line will move along while we're talking.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Inari One and I are waiting in line, the topic
I bring up is...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know we're in line for ramen and all, but my fave
food is probably soba!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I could eat it every day! Actually, I learned a
thing or two 'bout makin' it back in my hometown.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I might not be great in the kitchen, but when it
comes to soba, I can hold my own!
choice_data_list: Amazing! You can make it by yourself!
Amazing! You can make it by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh, well I'm not a pro or anythin'. Mine can't
compare to a proper restaurant's.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're a curious one! And that makes me
wanna deliver!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll make some for ya next time then. Be prepared
for a flavor explosion!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
By the way, what's your preference when it comes
to soba noodles, Boss? Gimme a li'l hint for
reference!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
By the way, what's your preference when it comes
to soba noodles, Boss? Gimme a li'l hint for
reference!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, Inari One and I are in deep
conversation about soba.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Staff
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you two waiting! This way, please!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's already our turn?! Time just flew by!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to quit thinkin' 'bout soba and
focus on the ramen!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spending the day standing in line together, I can't
help but feel the distance between me and Inari
One has shrunk a little.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, the sauna at the bathhouse I
usually go to is bein' fixed right now. It's super
annoyin'.
choice_data_list: You really enjoy saunas, don't you?
You really enjoy saunas, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
'Course I do! Takin' a hot bath is nice, but so are
saunas! Plus, there's a particular way to enjoy 'em.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya gotta follow all the right steps and then savor
every moment... Before ya know it, you'll be in
heaven!
choice_data_list: You're making me want to try it now.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heeey, great idea! I'll give ya some sauna
recommendations later! It's even better after a
hard day's work!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I've scoped out pretty much every bathhouse in
the area! There isn't a single thing 'bout baths and
saunas the great Inari doesn't know!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss, what kinda baths do ya like? Now that
we're on the subject, I realized I've never asked
ya.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss, what kinda baths do ya like? Now that
we're on the subject, I realized I've never asked
ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, Inari One and I are in deep
conversation about baths and saunas.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Staff
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you two waiting! This way, please!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's already our turn?! Time just flew by!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, now how 'bout we sample a bowl of
Oguri's top pick?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spending the day standing in line together, I can't
help but feel the distance between me and Inari
One has shrunk a little.
